case_title: THE PICTURE PEOPLE VS. AYANNA BANKS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JAN CORWIN RE: CCP 585(D) -(INCLUDES COMPLIANCE WITH CC 1719) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PICTURE PEOPLE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-22-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $564.94 AS TO DEFENDANT BANKS, AYANNA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PICTURE PEOPLE SERVED SEP-09-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANKS, AYANNA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PICTURE PEOPLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKS, AYANNA $376.52 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $521.52, PRINCIPAL INCLUDES $282.39 PER CC1719.
